label: Transparent fjord motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fjord transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fjord cliffs landscape motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete emblematic subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact Nordic coast fjord scene as a single cutout motif: deep blue still water inlet between steep granite cliffs, dark wet stone faces, pale snow caps and ledges, thin mist at the cliff bases, sparse cold-weather vegetation only as tiny accents. Calm, precise, planning-system mood; geological realism; the motif should read clearly as fjord cliffs and deep blue water.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include water, left and right cliffs, and snow without cropping. Clean studio-style lighting adapted to a natural landscape miniature; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no boats, no buildings, no people, no aurora, no fantasy glow, no text, no watermark, no generic mountain lake, no tropical colors, no saturated purple/blue gradients.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fjord light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fjord", derived from a Nordic coast fjord cliffs motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible calm planning system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board intended for 3840x2160 export, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large legible labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fjord, Fjord, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Planning Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from deep blue still fjord water, cold granite cliffs, pale snow ledges, mist, and Nordic coast light. The board must read as fjord cliffs and calm planning, not generic blue SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Planning Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, timeline planning rows, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: calm planning system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius, snow-white backgrounds, deep fjord primary actions, granite borders, pale ice muted panels, precise grid, quiet charts, subtle cliff-strata texture and waterline dividers, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Snowfield, Fjord Ink, Deep Water, Granite, Ice Mist, Cliff Moss, Slate Tide, Glacial Blue, Night Sound.
Constraints: no boats, no buildings, no people, no aurora, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock landscape photo panels, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fjord", no tiny unreadable text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fjord dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Fjord". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a Nordic coast fjord cliffs motif.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board intended for 3840x2160 export, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large legible labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fjord, Fjord, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Planning Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve deep blue water active states, cold granite surfaces, pale snow highlights, ice mist dividers, cliff-strata texture, and calm planning-system rhythm. Must read as fjord cliffs and deep Nordic coast water, not generic dark blue SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Planning Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, timeline planning rows, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: night-fjord ink backgrounds, slate tide cards, glacial blue focus rings, snowfield foreground text, granite borders, deep water buttons, muted ice mist panels, quiet moss success states, calm accessible contrast, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Palette names to show: Snowfield, Fjord Ink, Deep Water, Granite, Ice Mist, Cliff Moss, Slate Tide, Glacial Blue, Night Sound.
Constraints: no boats, no buildings, no people, no aurora, no neon, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock landscape photo panels, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fjord".
